description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, rectangular design and a flat roof. The exterior walls are clad in light gray brick, punctuated by large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. A wooden deck with outdoor seating and planters extends from one side, providing a welcoming porch area. The interior is visible through the windows and open walls, revealing a living room, kitchen, bedrooms, and a bathroom, all arranged in an open-plan configuration. The main entrance is marked by a wooden door set into a slightly recessed section of the facade. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a functional, urban-friendly footprint.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with light gray brick walls, large black-framed windows, and a wooden porch deck. The layout is open-plan with visible living spaces and a contemporary design.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the bungalow with the wooden porch deck and outdoor seating, as well as large windows revealing the living area inside.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear of the bungalow, featuring more windows and a clear view into the kitchen and living spaces.
description_view_2: The main entrance with a wooden door is visible here, along with a side view of the kitchen and dining area through the windows.
description_view_3: This perspective focuses on the porch deck and the large glass doors leading into the living room, emphasizing the indoor-outdoor connection.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
